name: Sitemap Parser
description: Discover URLs from XML sitemaps. Fetches sitemap.xml (and nested sitemap indexes), parses XML entries, and returns URLs with metadata. Supports include/exclude regex patterns for filtering at source. Automatically retries with headless browser for bot-protected sites (403/429/503).
usage_notes: Always run first — cheapest and fastest discovery method. Most well-structured sites have XML sitemaps. Returns the most URLs with the least cost. Automatically retries with headless browser for bot-protected sites (403/429/503).

options.name: max_urls
options.label: Maximum URLs per site
options.description: Limit how many URLs to extract per sitemap.

options.name: include_nested_sitemaps
options.label: Follow nested sitemaps
options.description: If sitemap index found, follow child sitemaps.

options.name: url_pattern
options.label: URL include pattern
options.description: Only include URLs matching this pattern (regex). Leave empty for all.

options.name: exclude_patterns
options.label: URL exclude patterns
options.description: Exclude URLs matching any of these patterns (one regex per line). Applied before max_urls limit. Use presets for common entity types (Operator, Affiliate, B2B).
